_comment: Copy this file to config.json and change only what you need.
_comment2: Any value you omit will use the built-in default.
_comment_engine: Engine: 'mlx' = Apple Silicon GPU (~7x faster), 'whisperx' = CPU (compatible)
_comment_model: parakeet = best accuracy, no hallucinations. Or Whisper: small.en, medium.en, turbo, etc.
_comment_compute: compute_type and device are only used by the whisperx engine

batch_sizes._comment: Higher = faster but more RAM. Tuned for M1 16GB.

paths._comment: Change obsidian_base to your vault location.

whisper._comment: Only used when default_model is a Whisper model (not parakeet).
whisper._comment2: Skips silent segments where hallucination is detected. Set to null to disable.

denoise._comment: Spectral subtraction — only used with Whisper models. Parakeet skips this automatically.
denoise._comment2: Reduces background noise using first N seconds as noise profile.

diarization._comment_engine: mlx-audio = fast Apple GPU (max 4 speakers), pyannote = slow CPU (unlimited speakers)
diarization._comment_tuning: threshold (0-1): speaker detection sensitivity. min_duration: ignore segments shorter than this. merge_gap: merge same-speaker segments closer than this.

live._comment: Adaptive scaling auto-adjusts chunk_interval and batch_size during recording.
live._comment_model: Live uses a lighter model for real-time. Post-recording uses default_model.

_comment_auto_title: Use calendar event name as transcript title when recording during a meeting.

watch._comment: calendars: [] = watch all. Set ['Work'] to filter.
watch._comment_record_only: true = record during meeting, transcribe after. false = live transcribe during meeting.

_comment_formats: Supported audio formats: MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG, FLAC, WebM
